Hero.text: Kelcius Lorhen, the ruthless king and military genius of the Kingdom of Lorhen, is a enigmatic man of formidable power and ambition in the world of Quintessence. Kelcius is a tall and imposing figure, with a chiseled face adorned by a well-groomed beard, sharp piercing eyes that seem to see through his opponents, and a crown that signifies his authority. He is often dressed in regal attire, combining gold and crimson colors that reflect his dark and ambitious nature.
